title: Dragon Elytra
description: Makes the Elytra look like Dragon wings.
body:
**Dragon Elytra is a small resource pack that replaces the normal elytra with Ender Dragon–style wings.**

The design keeps the original Minecraft look while making the elytra feel more powerful and connected to the End. The wings are dark, sharp, and inspired by the Ender Dragon without changing gameplay or adding extra effects.

This pack is lightweight and works fully in vanilla. It is meant for players who like subtle visual upgrades instead of flashy or overdone textures.

The original texture used in this pack is from vanillatweaks.net and belongs to them. This pack is only a repack and presentation of that texture.

You are free to use this texture in your own packs, but please make sure to give credit to vanillatweaks.net as well, just like I have done here.

Thanks
~_inxane7_
